page_metadata.biotools__summary: THPDB2 is an updated version of ThPDB developed for peptide-based therapeutics. It is a comprehensive database of detailed information about the approved and approved/investigational therapeutic protiens/peptides.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: THPDB2 is an updated version of ThPDB developed for peptide-based therapeutics. It is a comprehensive database of detailed information about the approved and approved/investigational therapeutic protiens/peptides.
